doc_title_en: Notice of Correction of FY3/27 Consolidated Earnings Forecast and Interim Dividend (Surplus Distribution), and Revision of Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)

key_facts.reason_jp: 商品力アップ・調達原価見直しによる利益率向上および業績予想上方修正を踏まえて

summary_en: ¥16.50/share interim dividend (FY3/27, record date 31 Mar 2026) + ¥16.50/share year-end (vs. ¥15.00 each previously). Annual FY3/27 dividend raised to ¥33.00/share from ¥30.00/share. Driven by upward FY3/27 earnings revision: consolidated net income +12.9% to ¥1,050M on improved margins from product mix and procurement savings.
summary_jp: FY3/27 中間配当 ¥16.50/株（基準日 3/31）+期末 ¥16.50/株（前回 ¥15.00 各）。年間配当 ¥33.00 に引上げ（¥30.00 から）。営業利益+12.5%、純利益+12.9% の業績上振れに伴い実施。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - FY3/27 - ¥16.50/share interim + ¥16.50/share year-end (was ¥15.00 each) - ¥33.00 annual
